.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add verification steps for Node.js and npm installation.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default syntax.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.why_exists: Storybook 7+ and modern bundlers (Webpack 5) default to ESM; using CommonJS may cause module resolution errors or deprecation warnings in strict ESM environments.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Update storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add @storybook/addon-onboarding to the addons list for improved developer experience.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual regression testing integration.
Add @storybook/addon-interactions to the addons list for interaction testing support.
Explicitly define the framework as @storybook/react-webpack5 in the configuration.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Remove custom webpack plugin WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning from the configuration.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Remove require statement for the custom webpack plugin that is no longer used.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.
Add mswLoader to the preview loaders to integrate Mock Service Worker with Storybook stories.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Update baseUrl path to remove leading dot-slash for cleaner configuration.
Add include directive to explicitly scope the configuration to the src directory.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility with modern build tools.
Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser-based integration testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to Spring Boot and Jar plugins.
Add new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different testing environments.
Update artifact ID and name to reflect new project identity.
